overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating rain-soaked neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The player drives through urban corridors, tunnels, and a combat zone with burning wreckage, showcasing dynamic lighting and atmospheric fog effects.

events.description: making right turn at intersection near Los Osos building

agents.ego_description: navigating motorcycle through wet city streets, accelerating from under overpass and turning right at intersection

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure with green signage visible ahead
building with prominent cyan 'LOS OSOS' neon signage
tall building with vertical 'HOTEL' neon sign in green
large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements
tall street lamps lining the road edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass in a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The player accelerates past the Los Osos building with its distinctive cyan neon sign and approaches a tall Hotel tower. Making a right turn at the intersection, the motorcycle continues through streets lined with palm trees and modern glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway with elevated overpasses

events.description: approaching the Grand Imperial Mall tunnel entrance with covered structure ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway, passing under multiple concrete overpasses while maintaining high speed

entered.detail: raised highway ramps and support columns running parallel to road
large overhead digital screen mounted on overpass structure
tunnel entrance with signage indicating Grand Imperial Mall location
roadside concrete dividers and sound walls

segments.scene_description: Driving on an open multi-lane highway, the player passes under a series of concrete overpasses with digital billboards. The Los Osos building and Hotel tower fade behind as the motorcycle accelerates toward the Grand Imperial Mall tunnel entrance, with elevated highway structures visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered tunnel under Grand Imperial Mall

events.description: entering dark tunnel with artificial overhead lighting replacing neon sky
exiting tunnel back into open air with visibility improving

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through the covered tunnel section, navigating slight curves

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered roadway with ventilation grates
smooth concrete walls lining both sides of the tunnel
linear artificial lighting fixtures mounted on tunnel ceiling
bright light visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating exit

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters the Grand Imperial Mall tunnel, transitioning from neon-lit open sky to an enclosed concrete corridor with artificial overhead lighting. The environment becomes darker and more confined as the player drives toward the bright exit light at the tunnel's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: combat zone with burning vehicle wreckage and debris

events.description: entering area with burning vehicles and smoke reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating through hazardous area with burning wreckage and debris on the road

entered.detail: destroyed vehicle with active flames and smoke on the roadside
thick smoke rising from multiple burning vehicles reducing visibility
rubble and wreckage scattered across the asphalt surface
crushed and twisted metal road barriers

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a chaotic combat zone with burning vehicle wrecks lining the left side of the road. Thick smoke reduces visibility while the player navigates through debris and damaged barriers, transitioning from the enclosed tunnel to a war-torn urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: main arterial road leading to West Wind Estate

events.description: passing West Wind Estate marker, entering cleaner commercial district

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed through cleaner urban streets, approaching traffic signals

entered.detail: large commercial complex with 'WEST WIND ESTATE' signage visible
multiple layers of highway overpasses crossing above the road
traffic signal lights showing red at the upcoming intersection
tall structure with multiple illuminated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Leaving the combat zone behind, the player enters the cleaner West Wind Estate district with intact buildings and clear roads. The motorcycle speeds under multiple elevated highway overpasses toward a distant traffic light, with neon advertising towers visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from neon-lit urban corridors through a dark tunnel and into a chaotic war zone before reaching a pristine residential district. It begins under a concrete overpass, accelerating past the cyan neon of the Los Osos building and a tall hotel tower before turning through streets lined with palm trees and glass architecture. As the motorcycle reaches an open multi-lane highway, the city skyline fades behind a series of digital billboards and elevated structures, leading the camera directly into the enclosed concrete corridor of the Grand Imperial Mall tunnel. The scene then shifts from the artificial overhead lighting of the tunnel to the blinding exit light, which opens into a smoke-filled combat zone cluttered with burning vehicle wrecks and debris. Finally, the camera leaves the wreckage behind to enter the cleaner West Wind Estate, speeding under highway overpasses toward distant traffic lights and neon advertising towers.
